Since each row represents a cyclist and includes their nationality and points, we need to group by the cyclists' nationality (implied by the country code in the name format) and then sum their points. The Italian cyclists listed are Davide Rebellin with 25 points, Paolo Bettini with 20 points, and Franco Pellizotti with 15 points. By adding these points together (25 + 20 + 15), the total number of UCI Pro Tour points scored by an Italian cyclist is 60.
